description_long: This record player features a rectangular base with a gradient color scheme transitioning from teal to purple, topped with a large, circular platter that is white with a maroon center. The platter sits slightly elevated above the base, and a prominent tonearm assembly is mounted on one corner, featuring a metallic, articulated arm with a visible stylus at its end. The tonearm is accompanied by a black circular platform and red-tipped levers or switches, suggesting manual controls for playback. The surface of the base appears smooth and glossy, with a layered design that includes a black mat beneath the platter. No dust cover is present, leaving the platter and tonearm exposed. The overall design is modern, with clean lines and a visually striking color palette.
description: A modern record player with a white and maroon platter, metallic tonearm, and a gradient teal-to-purple rectangular base. The design is sleek, with exposed controls and no dust cover.
description_view_0: From this angle, the white platter with maroon center and the metallic tonearm assembly are clearly visible, along with the layered, gradient-colored base.
description_view_1: This view highlights the black mat beneath the platter and the tonearm extending over the platter, with the control area and red-tipped levers more visible.
description_view_2: The tonearm's mounting platform and the gradient color transition on the base are prominent, with the platter and tonearm both in clear view.
description_view_3: The tonearm and its mechanical details are most visible here, along with the exposed platter and the layered structure of the base.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present and prominently displayed, circular in shape, with a white outer ring and a maroon center. It occupies a large portion of the record player's top surface and appears to be made of plastic or composite material with a smooth, glossy finish. There are no visible grooves or patterns, and the platter sits atop a black mat.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, metallic, and articulated, extending from a black circular mounting platform. It is medium in length, with visible joints and a counterweight at the rear. The tonearm is positioned over the platter, suggesting it is ready for playback.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is visible at the end of the tonearm, appearing as a small, pointed component. It is attached to the tonearm and seems to be a separate, functional part, likely made of metal and plastic.
attribute_control_knobs: There are several control levers or switches visible near the tonearm's mounting platform, with red-tipped ends. They are small, cylindrical, and likely made of plastic or metal. No labeled control knobs or buttons are visible.
